assembly_order: Lock onto the verify lane and confirm existing verify binaries or rebuild them.
Treat tools/setup/setup_cli.py and tools/launcher/launch.py as canonical repo-local shells.
Use profile.bundle.mvp_default plus locks/pack_lock.mvp_default.json as the baseline content/config pair.
Create session artifacts with tools/xstack/session_create.py using the canonical saves layout or a runner fix.
Boot local authority through the already functional loopback path, not external multiplayer.
Prove one short start -> status -> save/load/resume cycle before broadening scope.
Only after that, run FAST validation and selected playtest/CTest suites, then widen to installed-mode, updater, and broader multiplayer work.
defer_until_after_baseline: TCP/UDP or any non-loopback multiplayer transport.
Broad semantic-domain wiring beyond what the baseline session actually needs.
Large convergence, rename, or ownership-rebinding work.
recommended_playable_baseline: Repo-local TUI/headless baseline using the verify build, default profile bundle, default pack lock, loopback authority only, and AppShell launcher/setup control surfaces.

missing_glue: None if existing verify binaries are acceptable; otherwise run cmake --preset verify and build the preset.
target_slices.name: Repo-local bootstrap
target_slices.recommended_surface: Use verify preset plus repo_wrapper_shim dist/ manifest.
stop_conditions: verify binaries exist or are rebuilt

missing_glue: Document Python/AppShell commands as canonical repo-local shells.
Keep compiled launcher/setup as wrappers only.
target_slices.name: Setup and launcher shell
target_slices.recommended_surface: Use python tools/setup/setup_cli.py and python tools/launcher/launch.py.

missing_glue: Keep saves under canonical saves/ or fix session boot save-root coupling.
target_slices.name: Session create/materialize
target_slices.recommended_surface: Use tools/xstack/session_create.py with bundle.mvp_default plus pack_lock.mvp_default.

missing_glue: Publish a single clear wrapper that calls the currently functional loopback controller path.
target_slices.name: Local authoritative loopback runtime
target_slices.recommended_surface: Use local singleplayer controller / launcher supervision, but limit transport expectations to loopback only.

missing_glue: Fix session_boot saves-root coupling before relying on non-default save roots.
Confirm client-facing load/resume path after session boot is stable.
target_slices.name: Save/load/resume path
target_slices.recommended_surface: Prefer canonical saves/<save_id> layout for now.
stop_conditions: session boot succeeds from a saved session

missing_glue: Capture a short repeatable smoke checklist.
target_slices.name: Internal playtest v0
target_slices.recommended_surface: Headless/TUI local authority only, default bundle/lock, repo-local manifest, FAST validation after boot smoke.
stop_conditions: client can attach or run loopback parity smoke
